title: 38-0-0: Football Squad Draft
notes:
Private League is here!

The new mode where you draft against your mates and settle it over a full season.

• Start a league and invite up to 10 friends with a single code
• Everyone snake drafts from the same spins, so it comes down to who picks smartest
• Pick your own formation
• Host settings: show or hide ratings while drafting, and fill any empty seats with bots
• When the draft ends, every squad is projected across a full 38 game season into one league table. Did yours overperform?

Casua
